response.justification: The candidate is an experienced full-stack software craftsman with roughly 14-16 years of varied engineering work, but the role requires director-level technical leadership in AI strategy with recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI products. The resume shows only recent, peripheral exposure to AI-agent tooling and no evidence of cloud/AI platform strategy, executive-level influence, or advising strategic customers at the scale this Principal Engineer role demands.
strengths: Broad multi-stack engineering background spanning web, mobile, embedded
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or demonstrated AI products/platforms
No director-level or principal IC scope demonstrated
Lacks cloud platform strategy and strategic customer advisory experience

key_factors.factor: Seniority and scope below Principal/Director IC
